title: Training Tracker overlay: tabbed layout (Training/Skills/Bonds/Skill Shop)

description: Tab scaffold: tab enum + in-memory state, tab bar, ScrollAre
notes: Tab enum + AtomicU8 in-memory state, draw_tab_bar (text labels), draw_overlay_inner dispatches to tabs; draw_start_hint when tracking off (hook counts shown only if pre-recorded); OVERLAY_MIN_WIDTH 300->340; LIST_MAX_HEIGHT=220 scroll areas.

draw_training_tab: egui::Grid tt_overview (Turn/Month, Energy w/ motivation color) + tt_stats (5-col headers w/ levels + value row) + Total + Rank placeholder (—, filled by Hachimi-Edge-2we) + Fans/Races line.
draw_skills_tab wraps existing draw_skills_panel in a max-height vertical ScrollArea.
draw_bonds_tab wraps existing draw_bonds_panel (bond_color) in a max-height vertical ScrollArea.

description: Skill Shop tab: SP + Running/Distance filters + show-full-pr
notes: draw_skill_shop_tab: SP + draw_skill_shop_controls (sort/Running/Distance/show-full-price) + draw_skill_shop_list (split from old panel) in a max-height ScrollArea.
